short_description: Experience intense martial arts combat in this evolved fighting game featuring a diverse roster, innovative mechanics, and immersive single-player and competitive online modes.
High-stakes tactical bounty hunting in a dark, atmospheric supernatural world. Survive brutal PvEvP encounters where every sound could be your last.
An immersive open-world action RPG featuring fluid combat, high-stakes exploration, and a rich, post-apocalyptic narrative set in a vast, vibrant landscape.
Experience authentic Cold War combat in this tactical sandbox shooter featuring realistic infantry warfare and a versatile platform for community-created mods.
Scavenge abandoned, industrialized moons for scrap while evading terrifying creatures in this suspenseful, co-op survival experience where communication is key to your crew's survival.
An immersive tactical extraction shooter featuring high-stakes combat, realistic weapon customization, and intense gunfights in a persistent battlefield.
An action-packed urban fantasy RPG featuring stylish combat, vibrant aesthetics, and a deep narrative set in the post-apocalyptic metropolis of New Eridu.
Reborn in a prehistoric world, master the elements, tame massive dinosaurs, and build your legacy in this immersive, graphically stunning survival adventure.
Build an empire that stands the test of time in this legendary 4X strategy game featuring innovative mechanics and deep historical simulation.
A sequel to the legendary third-person action MOBA, powered by Unreal Engine 5, featuring divine combat and strategic team-based gameplay.
Experience a dynamic massively multiplayer world featuring large-scale siege warfare, strategic combat, and shapeshifting abilities in a persistent fantasy landscape.
Survive a decaying kingdom, build magnificent bases, and master powerful combat in this sprawling open-world action RPG set in a world consumed by a deadly fog.
Uncover the dark secrets of a toy factory while surviving vengeful animatronics in this tense, atmospheric puzzle-horror adventure.
Embark on an emotional, genre-bending adventure designed exclusively for two, where cooperation is the only way to overcome whimsical challenges and mend a broken relationship.
Experience intense, large-scale battlefield combat in this epic tactical action game focusing on a new protagonist amidst the chaos of the Three Kingdoms era.
Experience authentic hockey action with refined gameplay mechanics, improved skating systems, and immersive atmospheres in the latest iteration of the premier NHL simulation franchise.
A hypnotically satisfying poker-themed roguelike where you create powerful illegal hands, discover game-breaking jokers, and trigger adrenaline-pumping combos to beat the ante.
Trapped in a cursed mobile game, you must survive the increasingly distorted reality of your virtual companion in this psychological horror experience.
Embark on a heroic journey across a kingdom in turmoil, mastering powerful archetypes and strategic turn-based combat in this fantasy epic from the creators of Persona.

game_title: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle
short_description: Uncover an ancient mystery in this cinematic first-person action-adventure, playing as Indiana Jones to outsmart enemies and traverse exotic locations across the globe.
Experience intense, large-scale World War II battles featuring tactical team-based gameplay, realistic ballistics, and a unique strategic meta-game.
Mario explores 3D worlds to rescue Princess Peach from Bowser in this groundbreaking adventure featuring innovative movement and iconic exploration.
Explore the dangerous, radioactive Chornobyl Exclusion Zone in this immersive open-world survival experience featuring intense combat and branching narratives.
A survival MMOFPS set in the radioactive Chernobyl Exclusion Zone, combining dynamic open-world exploration with intense tactical PvP and PvE combat.
Build, manage, and expand your own supermarket with friends in this immersive cooperative simulation game.
A vibrant 3D massively multiplayer online role-playing game featuring unique class systems, social exploration, and epic adventures in a reimagined fantasy world.
Survive grotesque experiments in this intense psychological horror game, either alone or with friends in cooperative trials designed to test your sanity and endurance.
Shape the future of androids and humanity in this cinematic thriller where every choice defines the fate of Detroit and its inhabitants.
Experience authentic mixed martial arts combat with deep rosters, realistic physics, and immersive knockout mechanics in the ultimate UFC simulation.
Build your dream home, cultivate crops, and explore a vibrant, cozy world with friends in this relaxing community-focused MMO adventure.
Struggle to survive in the heart of the Amazon rainforest using realistic crafting, hunting, and building mechanics while fighting to stay sane in a harsh wilderness.
Experience the next generation of aviation with advanced physics, diverse mission types, and global exploration in the most technologically sophisticated flight simulator to date.
Draft champions, build synergies, and outmaneuver opponents in this competitive round-based auto-battler set in the League of Legends universe.
Explore an infinite, procedurally generated universe filled with unique planets, alien life, and endless opportunities for discovery, trading, and survival.
Build your agricultural empire, operate authentic machinery, and manage crops or livestock in a highly immersive, expansive farming experience.
An immersive open-world action-shooter set in a crumbling Washington D.C., where players fight to restore order through tactical combat and strategic team-based gameplay.
An epic crossover fighting game featuring a massive roster of iconic video game characters battling on diverse stages to knock opponents out of the arena.
Navigate a zombie-infested city, master parkour, and scavenge for supplies in this intense open-world survival horror experience.
Go behind enemy lines in occupied France, utilizing tactical stealth and precision marksmanship to sabotage the Nazi war machine in this intense WWII combat experience.
Explore the supernatural island of Aeternum in this action-packed open-world RPG featuring intense combat and deep character progression.
Embark on a cozy island getaway with Hello Kitty and friends, solving puzzles, crafting items, and restoring an abandoned theme park in this charming life-simulation adventure.
Experience life as an editor-in-chief in this narrative-driven game where you influence public opinion and shape the future of a divided society.
Command powerful armored tanks in intense tactical battles to dominate the battlefield and secure victory in this classic combat simulation.
Descend into the basement in this definitive edition, featuring hundreds of items, challenging bosses, and endless procedural dungeons in an ever-evolving, dark adventure.
An open-world extraction shooter set in a post-apocalyptic world ravaged by massive, life-altering forces of nature. Gear up, loot, and survive the storm.
Navigate the sprawling state of San Andreas as CJ, an ex-gangbanger returning home to solve his mother's murder while building a criminal empire in this iconic open-world classic.
Explore a vast, magical open world in this cozy dress-up adventure featuring unique platforming mechanics and charming aesthetic customization.
Embark on an intergalactic adventure as a Vault Hunter, battling eccentric enemies and collecting billions of unique weapons in this high-octane looter-shooter.
A classic fantasy MMORPG featuring intense nation-based warfare, strategic class progression, and epic battles between the kingdoms of El Morad and Karus.
Manage your own supermarket, stock shelves, set prices, and expand your business in this immersive retail simulation game.
